faq.title: Cau hoi thuong gap
faq.subtitle: Tat ca nhung gi ban can biet ve FluxTurn. Khong tim thay dieu ban can? Hay lien he voi doi ngu ho tro cua chung toi.

whatIs.question: FluxTurn la gi va hoat dong nhu the nao?
whatIs.answer: FluxTurn la mot nen tang tu dong hoa quy trinh lam viec manh me cho phep ban ket noi ung dung va tu dong hoa cac tac vu lap di lap lai ma khong can lap trinh. Su dung trinh xay dung truc quan keo tha, ban co the tao cac quy trinh tu dong kich hoat boi su kien, lich trinh hoac kich hoat thu cong. Chi can ket noi ung dung, dinh nghia logic va de FluxTurn xu ly phan con lai.

codingSkills.question: Toi co can biet lap trinh de su dung FluxTurn khong?
codingSkills.answer: Khong can ky nang lap trinh! FluxTurn co trinh xay dung truc quan truc quan noi ban co the keo tha cac node, ket noi chung va cau hinh hanh dong thong qua cac bieu mau don gian. Tuy nhien, cho nguoi dung nang cao, chung toi cung ho tro thuc thi code tuy chinh bang JavaScript va Python trong quy trinh de co su linh hoat toi da.

integrations.question: Toi co the ket noi nhung ung dung va dich vu nao?
integrations.answer: FluxTurn tich hop voi hon 100 ung dung pho bien bao gom Gmail, Slack, Google Sheets, Telegram, Discord, Stripe, Shopify, OpenAI, co so du lieu nhu PostgreSQL va MongoDB, va nhieu hon nua. Chung toi lien tuc bo sung tich hop moi dua tren yeu cau cua nguoi dung.

freePlan.question: Co goi mien phi khong?
freePlan.answer: Co! Chung toi cung cap goi mien phi hao phong bao gom toi 500 luot thuc thi quy trinh moi thang, truy cap tat ca tich hop va kha nang tao quy trinh khong gioi han. Hoan hao cho du an ca nhan va nhom nho bat dau voi tu dong hoa.

selfHost.question: Toi co the tu luu tru FluxTurn tren may chu rieng khong?
selfHost.answer: Hoan toan co the! FluxTurn cung cap ca tuy chon luu tru tren cloud va tu luu tru. Giai phap tu luu tru cho ban toan quyen kiem soat du lieu va ha tang. Ly tuong cho doanh nghiep co yeu cau tuan thu nghiem ngat hoac nhom muon tu quan ly viec trien khai.

security.question: Du lieu cua toi an toan nhu the nao voi FluxTurn?
security.answer: Bao mat la uu tien hang dau cua chung toi. Chung toi su dung ma hoa AES-256 cap ngan hang cho tat ca du lieu luu tru va TLS 1.3 cho du lieu truyen tai. Thong tin dang nhap cua ban duoc ma hoa va khong bao gio luu duoi dang van ban thuan. Chung toi cung cung cap tuan thu SOC2, kiem soat truy cap dua tren vai tro va nhat ky kiem toan cho khach hang doanh nghiep.

failedWorkflow.question: Dieu gi xay ra khi quy trinh lam viec that bai?
failedWorkflow.answer: FluxTurn cung cap xu ly loi toan dien va giam sat. Khi quy trinh that bai, ban se nhan thong bao tuc thi qua email hoac kenh uu thich. Nhat ky thuc thi chi tiet giup ban xac dinh va khac phuc van de nhanh chong. Ban cung co the cau hinh thu lai tu dong va hanh dong du phong cho cac quy trinh quan trong.

aiWorkflows.question: Toi co the su dung AI trong quy trinh lam viec khong?
aiWorkflows.answer: Co! FluxTurn co kha nang AI tich hop duoc ho tro boi OpenAI, Anthropic va cac nha cung cap AI hang dau khac. Ban co the su dung AI de tao noi dung, phan tich du lieu, ra quyet dinh, phan loai thong tin va nhieu hon nua. Cac node tac nhan AI giup de dang them tri tue vao bat ky quy trinh lam viec nao.
